subject: A floating amorphous Eldrazi creature drifting through an open sky, trailing tentacles
description: An amorphous purple-black Eldrazi entity floats against a bright cloudy sky. The creature has no clear head or eyes — its body is a large bulging dark mass from which numerous slender tentacles and grasping appendages dangle and curl in multiple directions. Some appendages terminate in small limb-like projections. The creature's surface shifts between deep purple and near-black, with lighter gray highlights suggesting texture or membrane. The background is pale blue sky with soft white clouds. The creature's shape is entirely alien and asymmetrical, with no bilateral symmetry or recognizable anatomy.
foreground: Amorphous Eldrazi creature, dark purple-black body, multiple dangling tentacles and appendages
background: Bright open sky with soft white clouds
emotion: No face or readable expression; alien entity drifting through the sky
